source_pr.title: planner, executor: fix tp.Flen size when union with castIntAsString
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? fix #8231, fix tp.Flen size when union with castIntAsString ### What is changed and how it works? When execute `func unionJoinFieldType(a, b *types.FieldType) *types.FieldType`, if any union type is int and result.Flen is less than mysql.MaxIntWidth then set `resultTp.Flen = mysql.MaxIntWidth` ### Check List Tests - Unit test --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8442)

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("SELECT 'a' UNION SELECT uid FROM t1 order by 1 desc;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "150")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("SELECT 'a' UNION SELECT uid FROM t1 order by 1 desc;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "150")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("SELECT 'a' UNION SELECT uid FROM t1 order by 1 desc;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "150")) (executor/executor_test.go)
